allow: Bash(npx -p typescript tsc --noEmit --jsx react-jsx --esModuleInterop --moduleResolution node --baseUrl . --paths '{""""@/*"""": [""""./src/*""""]}' src/app/components/ui/icon.tsx)

Bash(SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN=sbp_4f602fc5a0cdd1aadfdeede18b30a4df9be50ad6 npx supabase db execute --project-ref knrfdiyvyrawcwxongxb "$\(cat <<'EOF'
-- 1. folders
CREATE TABLE folders \(
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\),
  name text NOT NULL,
  color text,
  parent_id uuid REFERENCES folders\(id\),
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now\(\)
\);

-- 2. transcriptions
CREATE TABLE transcriptions \(
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\),
  name text NOT NULL,
  duration text,
  language text,
  source text,
  status text CHECK \(status IN \('uploading', 'processing', 'done', 'error'\)\),
  summary text,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now\(\)
\);

-- 3. folder_assignments
CREATE TABLE folder_assignments \(
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\),
  transcription_id uuid REFERENCES transcriptions\(id\) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  folder_id uuid REFERENCES folders\(id\) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now\(\)
\);
EOF
\)" 2>&1)

Bash(SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN=sbp_4f602fc5a0cdd1aadfdeede18b30a4df9be50ad6 npx supabase db query --linked "$\(cat <<'EOF'
-- 1. folders
CREATE TABLE folders \(
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\),
  name text NOT NULL,
  color text,
  parent_id uuid REFERENCES folders\(id\),
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now\(\)
\);

-- 2. transcriptions
CREATE TABLE transcriptions \(
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\),
  name text NOT NULL,
  duration text,
  language text,
  source text,
  status text CHECK \(status IN \('uploading', 'processing', 'done', 'error'\)\),
  summary text,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now\(\)
\);

-- 3. folder_assignments
CREATE TABLE folder_assignments \(
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\),
  transcription_id uuid REFERENCES transcriptions\(id\) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  folder_id uuid REFERENCES folders\(id\) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now\(\)
\);
EOF
\)" 2>&1)

Bash(SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN=sbp_4f602fc5a0cdd1aadfdeede18b30a4df9be50ad6 npx supabase db query --linked -f /dev/stdin <<'EOF'
SELECT table_name, column_name, data_type, is_nullable
FROM information_schema.columns
WHERE table_schema = 'public'
  AND table_name IN \('folders', 'transcriptions', 'folder_assignments'\)
ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position;
EOF)
